title: Phase 1 Synthesis — Complete Map of the Descent Problem

analysis.object: T761: Phase 1 Synthesis — Complete Map of the Descent Problem depth analysis

what_is_proved.description: Steps 1-2 proved: tropical cycle -> Berkovich analytic cycle (EML-0 -> EML-3)
what_is_proved.reason: Analytification lifts -- T758 non-Arch shadow theorem

what_is_open.description: Step 3 open: Berkovich analytic cycle -> algebraic cycle (EML-3 -> EML-0)

equivalent_formulation.description: Berkovich Cycle GAGA = Hodge descent = the same theorem (T759)

artin_applicability.description: Artin approximation applies IF Berkovich cycle has formal model

failure_profile.description: All known failures are EML-2 or EML-3, not EML-inf (T756)

phase1_target.description: Phase 2 target: prove Berkovich analytic cycles have formal models, then Artin closes the gap
phase1_target.reason: T761: the attack vector is formal model existence

analysis.theorem: T761: Phase 1 Synthesis — Complete Map of the Descent Problem (S1040).

key_theorem: T761: Phase 1 Synthesis — Complete Map of the Descent Problem (S1040).
